# Plugin Hooks Integration Test
#
# Verifies that plugin-defined hooks fire on todo events and
# that hook output is recorded in the audit log.

env SIN_CODE_CONFIG_DIR=$WORK/config
env SIN_CODE_TEST_PLUGIN_HOOKS=1
mkdir -p $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins
mkdir -p $WORK/source-plugin/bin

# Create a plugin with a post_add hook
sin-code execute --command 'printf "name = \"hook-test-plugin\"\nversion = \"1.0.0\"\n[[hooks]]\nevent = \"post_add\"\ncommand = \"printf hook-received-%s $SIN_TODO_ID\"\ntimeout = 10\n" > $WORK/source-plugin/plugin.toml'
stdout 'Exit:'

# Install plugin
sin-code execute --command 'cp -r $WORK/source-plugin $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins/hook-test-plugin'
stdout 'Exit:'

# Verify plugin is listed
sin-code plugin --path $WORK/config/sin-code/plugins list
stdout 'hook-test-plugin'

# Add a todo item (should fire post_add hook)
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db add --title "Test hook trigger"
stdout 'st-'

# Verify audit log has the hook entry
sin-code todo --db $WORK/todo.db timeline
stdout 'plugin_hook:post_add'
